query:
UPDATE users
SET
  planTier = 'trial',
  trialRunsRemaining = 50,
  trialStartedAt = COALESCE(trialStartedAt, createdAt),
  trialExpiresAt = COALESCE(trialExpiresAt, DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 60 DAY)),
  monthlyRunsUsed = 0,
  totalCompletedRuns = COALESCE(totalCompletedRuns, 0),
  totalAgentsFired = COALESCE(totalAgentsFired, 0)
WHERE planTier = 'trial' AND trialStartedAt IS NULL;
command:

  trialStartedAt = COALESCE(trialStartedAt, createdAt),
  trialExpiresAt = COALESCE(trialExpiresAt, DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 60 DAY)),
  monthlyRunsUsed = 0,
  totalCompletedRuns = COALESCE(totalCompletedRuns, 0),
  totalAgentsFired = COALESCE(totalAgentsFired, 0)
WHERE planTier = 'trial' AND trialStartedAt IS NULL;
